author: CasaOS Team
description: Deluge contains the common features to BitTorrent clients such as Protocol Encryption, DHT, Local Peer Discovery (LSD), Peer Exchange (PEX), UPnP, NAT-PMP, Proxy support, Web seeds, global and per-torrent speed limits. As Deluge heavily utilises the ​libtorrent library it has a comprehensive list of the ​features provided.
tagline: A lightweight and free BitTorrent client.

tips.before_install:
Default Password: `deluge`

Default Accessible Path in Deluge

| Name | Value |
| --- | --- |
| DATA Path | `/DATA` |
| Downloads Path | `/DATA/Downloads` |
| Media Path | `/DATA/Media` |

The paths of other DATA subdirectories in CasaOS are also similar.

Please make sure you use the correct path when using Deluge.

releaseNotes.en_US:
- Deluge 2.2.0 removes Python 3.6 support and fixes multiple GHSL security issues in update checks and Web UI endpoints.
- Core and UI changes add v2 torrent creation, theme switching, network-interface name support, and AutoAdd watch-folder improvements.
releaseNotes.en_GB:
- Deluge 2.2.0 removes Python 3.6 support and fixes multiple GHSL security issues in update checks and Web UI endpoints.
- Core and UI changes add v2 torrent creation, theme switching, network-interface name support, and AutoAdd watch-folder improvements.
releaseNotes.it_IT:
- Deluge 2.2.0 rimuove il supporto Python 3.6 e risolve diversi problemi di sicurezza GHSL nei controlli degli aggiornamenti e negli endpoint Web UI.
- Le modifiche al core e a UI aggiungono la creazione di torrent v2, il cambio di tema, il supporto dei nomi network-interface e miglioramenti a AutoAdd watch-folder.
releaseNotes.nb_NO:
- Deluge 2.2.0 fjerner Python 3.6-støtte og fikser flere GHSL sikkerhetsproblemer i oppdateringssjekker og Web UI endepunkter.
- Kjerne- og UI-endringer legger til v2 torrentoppretting, temabytte, network-interface navnestøtte og AutoAdd watch-folder forbedringer.
releaseNotes.zh_CN:
- Deluge 2.2.0 移除了对 Python 3.6 的支持，并修复了更新检查和 Web UI 端点中的多个 GHSL 安全问题。
- 核心和界面更新加入了 v2 种子创建、主题切换、网络接口名称支持，以及 AutoAdd 监控文件夹改进。
releaseNotes.ja_JP:
- Deluge 2.2.0 は Python 3.6 のサポートを終了し、更新チェックと Web UI エンドポイントに関する複数の GHSL セキュリティ問題を修正します。
- コアと UI の変更により、v2 torrent 作成、テーマ切り替え、ネットワークインターフェイス名のサポート、AutoAdd 監視フォルダーの改善が追加されます。
releaseNotes.ko_KR:
- Deluge 2.2.0은 Python 3.6 지원을 제거하고 업데이트 확인 및 Web UI 엔드포인트의 여러 GHSL 보안 문제를 수정합니다.
- 코어와 UI 변경으로 v2 토렌트 생성, 테마 전환, 네트워크 인터페이스 이름 지원, AutoAdd 감시 폴더 개선이 추가됩니다.
releaseNotes.fr_FR:
- Deluge 2.2.0 supprime la prise en charge de Python 3.6 et corrige plusieurs problèmes de sécurité GHSL dans les vérifications de mise à jour et les points d'accès de l'interface Web.
- Les changements du cœur et de l'interface ajoutent la création de torrents v2, le changement de thème, la prise en charge des noms d'interfaces réseau et des améliorations des dossiers surveillés AutoAdd.
releaseNotes.de_DE:
- Deluge 2.2.0 entfernt die Unterstützung für Python 3.6 und behebt mehrere GHSL-Sicherheitsprobleme in Update-Prüfungen und Web-UI-Endpunkten.
- Core- und UI-Änderungen ergänzen v2-Torrent-Erstellung, Theme-Wechsel, Unterstützung für Netzwerkschnittstellennamen und Verbesserungen für AutoAdd-Überwachungsordner.
releaseNotes.sv_SE:
- Deluge 2.2.0 tar bort Python 3.6-stöd och fixar flera GHSL-säkerhetsproblem i uppdateringskontroller och Web UI-slutpunkter.
- Kärn- och UI-ändringar lägger till v2 torrentskapande, temabyte, network-interface namnstöd och AutoAdd watch-folder förbättringar.
releaseNotes.el_GR:
- Το Deluge 2.2.0 καταργεί την υποστήριξη Python 3.6 και διορθώνει πολλαπλά ζητήματα ασφάλειας GHSL στους ελέγχους ενημέρωσης και στα τελικά σημεία Web UI.
- Οι αλλαγές Core και UI προσθέτουν v2 δημιουργία torrent, εναλλαγή θεμάτων, υποστήριξη ονόματος network-interface και AutoAdd watch-folder βελτιώσεις.
releaseNotes.hr_HR:
- Deluge 2.2.0 uklanja Python 3.6 podršku i popravlja višestruke GHSL sigurnosne probleme u provjerama ažuriranja i web UI krajnjim točkama.
- Temeljne i UI promjene dodaju v2 stvaranje torrenta, promjenu teme, network-interface podršku za nazive i AutoAdd watch-folder poboljšanja.
releaseNotes.pt_PT:
- Deluge 2.2.0 remove o suporte Python 3.6 e corrige vários problemas de segurança GHSL em verificações de atualizações e endpoints Web UI.
- As alterações principais e UI adicionam a criação de torrent v2, troca de tema, suporte de nome network-interface e melhorias AutoAdd watch-folder.
releaseNotes.ru_RU:
- В Deluge 2.2.0 удалена поддержка Python 3.6 и исправлены многочисленные проблемы безопасности GHSL при проверках обновлений и конечных точках Web UI.
- Изменения ядра и UI добавляют создание торрентов v2, переключение тем, поддержку имен network-interface и улучшения AutoAdd watch-folder.
releaseNotes.tr_TR:
- Deluge 2.2.0, Python 3.6 desteğini kaldırır ve güncelleme kontrollerinde ve Web UI uç noktalarında birden fazla GHSL güvenlik sorununu düzeltir.
- Çekirdek ve UI değişiklikleri, v2 torrent oluşturma, tema değiştirme, network-interface ad desteği ve AutoAdd watch-folder iyileştirmelerini ekler.

title: Deluge
